# Managing Trusted Devices

In the account security management section, users can view and manage a list of trusted devices. Each device can be removed individually, or users can choose to sign out all devices simultaneously. When a device is removed, it will require a new two-factor authentication challenge upon its next sign-in attempt.

[Source: account_security.md#managing-trusted-devices]
